title: crotalaria lunata
intro: Crotalaria lunata, also known as the moon crotalaria or moon rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Crotalaria lunata are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
